title: columnea major
intro: Columnea major, also known as the goldfish plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations to treat fever, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Columnea major can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice to utilize its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being.
